title: /memory:search Runtime Bugs and Refinements
description: Findings spec cataloging 17 defects across the /memory:search runtime: intent classifier mis-routing, memory_context truncation wrapper dropping results to zero, output vocabulary violations, causal-stats inconsistencies, ephemeral-session dedup defeat, folder-discovery misfires, lopsided graph growth, and missing quality-gap fallback. Includes live MCP probe evidence and 7 root-cause clusters for remediation.
